---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for FinTrack
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or need. E.g. "I can never tell how much
I spent on transport this quarter."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Mock-ups, examples from other apps, anything else useful.
